steps: Let positions be on a number line, with east as positive. Let post office be at 0. Library is x metres east of post office, so library at x. Bakery is 380 metres west of library, so bakery at x - 380. Distance between post office (0) and bakery (x - 380) is 95 metres, and bakery is west of post office, so bakery position is negative: x - 380 < 0. Distance = |0 - (x - 380)| = |380 - x| = 95. Since bakery is west of post office, 380 - x > 0, so 380 - x = 95 → x = 380 - 95 = 285. Check: library at 285, bakery at 285 - 380 = -95, distance from post office (0) to bakery (-95) is 95, bakery west of post office. So x = 285 m.
